meta.name: Ink system pump/tube KB (v4, warning policy + elimination rules + cause relations)
notes: Bayesian update baseline (Naive Bayes): checks/tests assumed conditionally independent given the true root cause.
Initial priors are uniform per error code (per user request), except 250001 includes an added condition-level cause 'Expired / viscous ink' to support warning 290020 reasoning.
Likelihood tables included only for key discriminative observations; missing pairs fall back to uniform at inference time.
Repair actions can fail; their outcomes are modeled via OBS_RESOLVED and action_success tables.
Updated session stop policy: hypothesis exhaustion based on probability threshold only (repair failure does not automatically exhaust a cause).
Updated repair recommendation threshold: recommend repair when top cause probability >= 0.80 (optionally 'consider repair' at >=0.75).
Added automatic tags to root causes (keyword-based).
Added expensive repair policy + confirm-test mapping placeholders.
Added upstream cause generation config (dynamic expansion).
Added procedure targeting rules with hard elimination on negative outcomes (posterior set to 0 for targeted causes).
Added warning policy: warnings treated as initial observations when available; otherwise can be asked as checks.
Added minimal cause_relations for upstream mapping (seed).

stop_condition.exhaustion_rule_default: hypothesis exhausted if its probability < epsilon (repair failure is treated as evidence, not automatic exhaustion).

repair_recommendation.notes: If recommended repair is performed and OBS_RESOLVED=no, treat this as a new observation and re-run Bayes update.

expensive_repair_policy.rule: Expensive repairs require at least one confirming check/test before recommendation is allowed.

upstream_generation.notes: Upstream candidates selected dynamically using overlap between context (error description + symptoms + warnings) and root-cause labels/tags.

warning_policy.rule: Warnings are treated as initial observations when available. If a warning is not provided, the system may suggest a corresponding warning check as a procedure.

root_causes.label: No closed clamp on the air hose / Unopened air hose.
Faulty electrical connection of Ink Leak sensor
Blockage in the Print Head Boiler Tube
Blockage in ink tube from 3-way valve to Printhead
Pump tube recently replaced without resetting the maintenance counter
Pressure failure inside the printhead due to a blocked air-tube
Tube is not in the pump
Ink level low in ink tank

Warning 290020 (ink expired) appeared before current error
Ink pump lifetime counter
Pump tube lifetime counter

Tube is in pump

SDS 02-6-010 White Ink Recirculation result

procedures.label: Check if new printhead or ink tube was installed recently
Check if ink valves at printheads are open
procedures.notes: If valves are open, eliminate closed-valves cause; if closed, supports it.

procedures.label: Check for Warning 290020 (ink expired)
procedures.notes: If warning 290020 not seen, eliminate expired-ink cause (for this path).

procedures.label: Check for Warning 290005
procedures.notes: If warning 290005 not seen, eliminate pump-tube-wear causes (for this path).

procedures.label: Check pump tube wear
procedures.notes: If wear check is not worn/severe, eliminate pump-tube wear causes.

procedures.label: Check pump tube position in ink pump
procedures.notes: If position is not wrong, eliminate wrong-position cause.

procedures.label: Check for traces of ink leakage inside machine
procedures.notes: If no leakage traces, eliminate leakage cause.

procedures.label: Check if air filter at manifold is colored by ink
procedures.notes: If air filter not ink-colored, eliminate clogged air filter cause.

procedures.label: Check if air tube at printhead connection is colored by ink
procedures.notes: If air tube not ink-colored, eliminate blocked air-tube cause.

procedures.label: Check for ink pollution outside printhead
Disconnect ink tube from printheads and check heartbeat
procedures.notes: Low risk per user; requires disconnect procedure.

procedures.label: Disconnect tubes and pull ink with syringe to assess ink tube flow
procedures.notes: If flow is free, eliminate tube clog/fault causes (for this diagnostic path).

procedures.label: Check / re-seat electrical wiring and connectors
Check ink level in ink tank
Check if maintenance counter reset to 0 after pump tube replacement
Reset parameter value of ink tube

error_code_models.description: Ink delivery to printhead failed (PH1, PH3, PH4, PH5, PH6). After starting the ink supply, it is expected to be stopped within a given time. When this doesn't occur this error is reported. This error can have to 2 different root causes. The ink was not transported to the printhead in time The level sensor in the printhead didn’t detect the received ink. The flowchart below can be used to minimize the MTTR and reduce the change of a second visit. Decision 1) : New installation Did the error occur during the installation of a new printhead ( Z-0402 ) or new ink tube ( Z-0502 )? In some rare cases it's known the ink valve of a printhead might be blocked (even if the valve is opened). In those cases please replace the valve by a new one (1070078229) or by removing the blockade by pushing a Torx-screwdriver through the valve. Don't replace the printhead. Action 1) : Mark as empty Mark printheads as empty and restart filling. See 04-6-020 Mark printhead(s) as empty [Special Tests] Decision 2) : Closed valves Check if the ink valves or air clamps on the printheads are closed. Action 2) : Open valves Open valves on carriage. Open clamps on air hose, rub the air hose to make sure the hose is open. Decision 3) : Warning 290020 Has warning 290020 appeared sometime before error 250001? Filter polluted with ink: mark the head as empty, replace the ink tube. Action 3): Clean ink system The ink in the printer is expired, this might result is clogged or viscous ink. Clean ink system Decision 4) : Warning 290005 Has warning 290005 appeared sometime before error 250001? Action 4): Replace pump tubes Check replace pump tubes Index Description Test Action Info Diagram Z-0203 -0064 Pump tube Check / replace 02 How to remove the pump tube of the ink pump Mapping pumps to printheads 02 Electrical diagram ink delivery Decision 5) : Bad pump tube Check the pump tube on wear out. Action 5): Replace pump tubes Check replace pump tubes Index Description Test Action Info Diagram Z-0203 -0064 Pump tube Check / replace 02 How to remove the pump tube of the ink pump Mapping pumps to printheads 02 Electrical diagram ink delivery Decision 6) : Heartbeat Disconnect the ink tube from printheads (See02 The ink replacement procedure , Chapter 3. Refill the system with new ink : Step 7 - 27 (end)) Is there a heartbeat after this procedure ? Decision 7) : Electrical issue Check/ re-seat the electrical wiring and connectors of the ink pump(s). Action 7): Solve electrical issue Index Description Test Action Info Diagram Z-0202 -0075 Ink supply PBA 02PBA01 Check / replace 02 How to remove the Ink supply PBA ( 02PBA01 ;) Mapping pumps to printheads 02 Electrical diagram ink delivery Decision 8) : Leakage Are there any traces of leaked ink inside the machine? (example: Valves, not connected tubes, ruptured tubes) Action 8): Repair leakage Replace leaking valves Reconnect tube Replace ruptured tubes Decision 9) : Clogged ink tube Disconnect the ink tube from printheads (See02 The ink replacement procedure , Chapter 3. Refill the system with new ink : Step 7 - 14) Disconnect the pump tube from the ink tube. Use a syringe to pull ink through the ink tubes. If ink is flowing freely through the ink tube, reconnect tubes and fill ink tubes (See02 The ink replacement procedure , Chapter 3. Refill the system with new ink : Step 15 - 27) Action 9A): Replace ink tube Index Description Test Action Info Diagram Z-0402 -002 Boiler unit of the printhead Check / replace 04 How to remove the boiler unit 04 The components of the printhead 04 Electrical diagram printheads Action 9B): Contact LFG-CS Check if heartbeat is present (See decision 6). If still no heartbeat, escalate to LFG-CS Decision 10) : O-ring type Not applicable for this system. Action 10): Replace printhead Index Description Test Action Info Diagram Z-0402 - 001 Printhead (PHD) 1 ... 6. Check / replace 04 How to replace a (failing) printhead: Overview document 04 The components of the printhead 04 Electrical diagram printheads Decision 11) : Air filter clogged Check if air filter of printhead contains ink. If the tube is completely filled with ink the air filter will be colored (see example below) In some cases the tube is not completely filled with ink and the air tube needs to be inspected at the bottom of the printhead (near the ink reservoir). This can be done by gently sliding the sleeve a few centimeters upward (see below). This way the transparent air tube will be visible. If this is colored there is ink inside the air tube. Check the condition of the tubes at the backside of the polluted airfilter If Ink passed the inkfilter into the manifold, no pressure can be given because the manifolds are blocked with ink. There will be no air leakage. also the observation is that the closed ink just flows through the printheads instead of being kept into the heads. Action 11A) : Replace air hose See 04 How to remove the air hose Action 11B) : Replace Boiler unit See 04 How to remove the boiler unit. Decision 12) : Out of other options Check if ink is coming out of recirculation circuit, if yes replace VALVE-TUBE-ASSY 02 How to remove the white ink 3-way valve If all previous actions did not solve the error and the error occurs on the white printhead, please check the 02Y5 (YMS_CAR_RECIRC_VA). You can do this by performing SDS 02-6-010 White Ink Recirculation (Special Test). If this did not solve the error, replace printhead. Action 12): Remove printhead Index Description Test Action Info Diagram Z-0402 - 001 Printhead (PHD) 1 ... 6. Check / replace 04 How to replace a (failing) printhead: Overview document 04 The components of the printhead 04 Electrical diagram printheads
Ink delivery to the printhead failed during initial filling.
symptoms: Ink delivery to the printhead failed during initial filling.

error_code_models.description: Ink Leak Sensor02B18 INK_LEAK_SE is active. OR ,white ink is discharged via the overpressure valve
symptoms: Faulty electrical connection of Ink Leak sensor
white ink is discharged via the overpressure valve

error_code_models.description: Inconsistent ink level (C, Y, M, K, W).
symptoms: Blocking mechanism in the ink loading interface is malfunctioning.
The ink level estimator in software is deviating too much.

error_code_models.description: This ORE is reported to prevent burst of ink tubes due to closed ink valves at the printhead carriage after installation or replacement of a printhead. This ORE is a reminder to check whether all ink valves are open. If all ink valves are checked, this ORE can be resolved. After printhead installation or replacement this ORE will be reported as soon as the printheads became warm. After reporting this ORE, the printheads will start cooling down again. Waiting a long time before resolving the ORE (checking the valves), will result in a long warm up time to get the engine in standby again.
Ink level sensor (C, M, Y, K or W) active while level estimation below zero.
symptoms: Ink level sensor active while level estimation below zero

error_code_models.description: Ink flow correction factor out of range. The ink flow correction factor calculated by the dosing pump calibration is out of range. This warning indicates a wear-out of the ink pump tubes. The ink pump tubes should be replaced. This warning might result in 250001 (ink delivery to PH failed) because the ink flow is too low.
symptoms: Ink flow correction factor out of range.

cause_relations.notes: Expired/viscous ink may contribute to filter contamination/clogging.
